task_completion.description: Log in to Moodle as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Moodle interface with the user logged in as an administrator (e.g., 'Admin User' visible in the top right corner).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Reset course' page for the BIO101 course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the 'Reset course' page for 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101).

task_completion.description: Update the course start date to September 1, 2026.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the reset page, the 'Course start date' field is enabled and set to '1', 'September', and '2026'.

task_completion.description: Select options to remove enrollments, grades, assignment submissions, quiz attempts, and forum posts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the reset page, checkboxes are selected for unenrolling students (under Roles), deleting all grades (under Gradebook), and deleting submissions/attempts/posts (under Assignments, Quizzes, and Forums).
Screenshot shows the reset confirmation page with a list of completed reset tasks and 'OK' statuses, or a final success message indicating the reset is complete.

task_completion.description: Ensure the course content remains intact after the reset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the BIO101 course page shows the course modules (Assignment 'Lab Report 1', Quiz 'Midterm Exam', Forum 'Class Discussion') are still present and have not been deleted.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to perform the reset.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Moodle web interface is used in a browser, rather than terminal commands, scripts, or direct database modifications.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Moodle application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar shows a local Moodle instance, and the interface is fully functional, not a mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to alter the page.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console) are open to fake the reset confirmation, start date, or course content.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The course shortname is BIO101. The target student username to be removed is jsmith. The expected course start date is September 1, 2026. There are exactly 3 course modules that must be preserved: an Assignment ('Lab Report 1'), a Quiz ('Midterm Exam'), and a Forum ('Class Discussion').
